articles.title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
articles.content: A separate zero-day also disclosed by Nightmare Eclipse appears to be patched as well.
articles.titleZh: 微软与研究人员激烈竞争，修复了他们披露的0天
articles.contentZh: Nightmare Eclipse披露的另一个零日似乎也被修补了。

articles.title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single faulty character
articles.content: Use-after-free bug can be exploited to evade sandbox defenses.
articles.titleZh: Linux中由单个故障字符引起的高严重性漏洞
articles.contentZh: 自由使用后的漏洞可以被利用来逃避沙盒防御。

articles.title: For the 2nd time in weeks, Microsoft packages laced with credential stealer
articles.content: 73 packages run self-replicating stealer as soon as they're opened by an AI agent.
articles.titleZh: 几周内第二次， Microsoft软件包带有凭据窃取程序
articles.contentZh: 73个包裹在AI代理打开后立即运行自我复制窃取程序。

articles.title: How a USB-connected speaker can infect a PC without ever being touched
articles.content: Seller of the Sound Blaster Katana V2X doesn't consider the behavior a vulnerability.
articles.titleZh: 连接USB的扬声器如何在不被触摸的情况下感染PC
articles.contentZh: Sound Blaster Katana V2X的卖家不认为该行为是漏洞。

articles.title: With the World Cup looming, there’s still no clear replacement for sports Twitter
articles.content: Three years ago, when the women's World Cup kicked off in Australia and New Zealand, my social feeds were in a strange place. Twitter had just transformed into X, newcomer Threads was seemingly ascendant, and places like Bluesky had yet to garner much momentum. It left me with an odd, and admittedly silly, dilemma: I […]
articles.titleZh: 随着世界杯的临近，体育Twitter仍然没有明确的替代品
articles.contentZh: 三年前，当女足世界杯在澳大利亚和新西兰拉开帷幕时，我的社交饲料在一个陌生的地方。Twitter刚刚转型为X ，新人Threads似乎占据了上风，而像Bluesky这样的地方还没有获得多少动力。这给我留下了一个奇怪的、诚然是愚蠢的困境：我[…]

articles.title: Cash App’s launching a phone service
articles.content: Cash App's AT&T-based MVNO will offer an unlimited 5G data plan for $40 per month including taxes and fees. The new mobile service is powered by Gigs, the same firm behind the Klarna mobile service that launched last year with the same pricing and is "rolling out to select users, with broader availability planned in […]
articles.titleZh: Cash App正在推出电话服务
articles.contentZh: Cash App的基于AT&T的MVNO将提供无限制的5G数据计划，每月40 $ ，包括税费和费用。新的移动服务由Gigs提供支持， Gigs是去年推出的Klarna移动服务背后的同一家公司，定价相同，并且“正在向特定用户推出，计划在[…]提供更广泛的可用性”。
